title: 'Danza de la Muerte': Spanish Holy Week's spookiest celebration
summary: Every year, the small Catalan town of Verges celebrates Easter in a unique way - the hair-raising 'Danza de la Muerte', or Dance of Death.

title: Islamophobic chants at Egypt friendly a new low for Spanish football
summary: The national side's friendly against Egypt on Tuesday was marred by more xenophobic incidents which continue to damage the image of Spanish football, as fans booed the Egyptian national anthem and sang chants mocking Muslims.
